Name: Ubuntu
Description: User-friendly and widely supported Linux distribution.
UseCase: Best for beginners and general use

Name: Fedora
Description: Cutting-edge features with strong developer focus.

Name: Debian
Description: Stable and reliable Linux distribution with a large package repository.

Name: Arch Linux
Description: Highly customizable minimal Linux system for advanced users.

Name: Pop!_OS
Description: Optimized for performance and gaming, especially with NVIDIA GPUs.

Name: openSUSE Leap
Description: Stable and enterprise-focused Linux distribution with great tools.

Name: Manjaro
Description: User-friendly Arch-based Linux with easy installation and hardware detection.

Name: Elementary OS
Description: Elegant Linux distribution focused on simplicity and aesthetics.

Name: Zorin OS
Description: Windows-like Linux distribution designed for smooth transition from Windows.

Name: Kali Linux
Description: Security-focused Linux distribution for penetration testing and ethical hacking.

Name: MX Linux
Description: Lightweight and stable Linux distribution with good performance on older hardware.
